Description: A warm evening skyline of Glasgow with historic towers and green landscapes glowing under golden light. I chose this image because it highlights the cities mix of culture, architecture, and peaceful nature.

A beautiful view of Edinburgh at dusk, highlighting the historic architecture, warm street lights, and iconic skyline. I chose this image because the city feels magical when the lights begin to glow over the old stone buildings.

A stunning view of the Alhambra overlooking Granada at golden hour, with warm sunlight  in the background. I chose this image because it captures the perfect blend of history, architecture, and natural beauty.

A breathtaking view of Ibb's green mountains wrapped in mist, with terraced fields and scattered traditional homes. I chose this image because it shows the calm, peaceful nature of Yemen highlands and their unique beauty.

A striking view of Thee Ain, the ancient marble village in Al-Baha, surrounded by rugged mountains and dramatic clouds. I chose this image because the villages bright stone structures and natural landscape make it one of Saudi Arabia most beautiful heritage sites.

A serene view of Lucerne is iconic Chapel Bridge reflected on the calm lake, with the wooden tower and alpine backdrop creating . I chose this image because it captures the charm of Swiss lakeside towns and the warmth of traditional architecture.

An elevated view of Machu Picchu nestled high in the Andes, with ancient stone terraces, and dramatic green valleys. I chose this image because it captures the mystery, history, and breathtaking nature of the Incan ruins.
A stunning view of the Hungarian Parliament Building glowing over the Danube River. I chose this image because it captures the elegance and grandeur of Budapest during sunset.

A vibrant night view of Tokyo's skyline, with glowing neon lights, modern skyscrapers, and the iconic Tokyo Tower rising above the city. I chose this image because it captures the energetic, futuristic atmosphere that makes Tokyo unique.

A bright spring view of Jeju Island, with blooming yellow canola flowers surrounding the walking path and the deep blue sea in the background. I chose this image because it shows Jeju's peaceful nature and its famous spring landscapes.
